name: design-system
description: World-class DS governance — skills + hooks + rules + CLAUDE.md instructions + 31 active M-rules + 56 audit dims. Source-of-truth for product workspaces consuming @your-org/design-system npm package.

_metadata.structure_note: Per Anthropic plugin spec(code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins),plugin components live at plugin root in standardized directories(skills/ / hooks/hooks.json / commands/ etc.)。本 repo current uses `.claude/` standalone layout — Phase 7 migration needed for full plugin distribution(see roadmap)。For now,GitHub-direct distribution via `/plugin marketplace add github:your-org/design-system`(consumer 透過 .claude-plugin/marketplace.json catalog 路徑)。
migration_path_for_full_plugin: .claude/rules/ → 確認 plugin spec 支援 path-scoped rules(目前 docs 沒明寫)
.claude/references/ + .claude/memory/ → 確認 plugin spec 如何包含
